// src/constants/index.js

export const STATUS_COLORS = {
  CREATED: '#003087',
  IN_TRANSIT_WILAYA: '#1e5bb8',
  AT_WILAYA_DEPOT: '#0f8a54',
  IN_TRANSIT_GAS_STATION: '#d68b00',
  AT_GAS_STATION: '#c0392b',
  SOLD: '#00a46c',
  EXPIRED_WILAYA:           '#c0392b',
  EXPIRED_GAS:              '#c0392b',
};

export const ORG_META = {
  central: { label: 'Central Depot', color: '#003087', icon: 'CD' },
  regional: { label: 'Regional Depot', color: '#0f8a54', icon: 'WD' },
  gas: { label: 'Gas Station', color: '#d68b00', icon: 'GS' },
};

export const MODAL_TITLES = {
  'create-type': 'Add New Tyre Stock',
  'send-wilaya': 'Send Batch to Regional Depot',
  'confirm-wilaya': 'Confirm Arrival at Wilaya',
  'send-gas': 'Send to Gas Station',

  'sell': 'Sell Tyres to Client',
  'add-station': 'Add New Gas Station',
